data.body: registry.py (criteria_v8 loader + applies_at proportionate-scrutiny routing + facet chunker base_chunk x size_factor + overlay triggers + completeness guard) + orchestrator.py (assemble_context reviews the WHOLE plan + children with NO truncation/content-chunking; DET + 1-TURN/2-STEP/AGENT exec-tier dispatch; size-handling ladder batch->one-per-call->escalate-model->P8 too-big finding; mints the stable finding id; advisory cap with blocking EXEMPT; Pass-4 dispatch). Built on the shipped rebar.llm runner + contracts + prompt model. Only the CODEBASE_GROUNDED set greps code. Unit-tested: registry coverage/applies/chunk + route_criteria.
